description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round ribbed neckline, fabric tape detailing on the in-seam of the neckline, graphic print vertically across the left front and puma logo embroidered on the left sleeve Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Run those marathons with ease in this ultra-comfortable cotton T-shirt from puma. Designed to wick sweat away and keep you fresh and comfortable all day, this tee looks great with shorts or jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
